commit.message:
Add continuous benchmarks

Add GitHub Actions workflow to run continuous benchmarks and publish to a tracking website.

Update .NET SDK (#33)

Update .NET SDK to version 9.0.100-preview.7.24407.12.

---
updated-dependencies:
- dependency-name: Microsoft.NET.Sdk
  dependency-type: direct:production
  update-type: version-update:semver-patch
...

Signed-off-by: costellobot <102549341+costellobot@users.noreply.github.com>

Consume .NET nightly builds

Consume the latest nightly builds of .NET 9.
